last_episode_to_air.name: Coming Home
last_episode_to_air.overview: Genet solidifies her base of power. Before Daryl can return to America, he has a job to do.

name: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
overview: Daryl washes ashore in France and struggles to piece together how he got there and why. The series tracks his journey across a broken but resilient France as he hopes to find a way back home. As he makes the journey, though, the connections he forms along the way complicate his ultimate plan.

seasons.name: The Book of Carol
seasons.overview: Picking up immediately after the first season, fan-favorite characters Daryl Dixon and Carol Peletier both confront old demons while she fights to find her friend and he struggles with his decision to stay in France, causing tension at the Nest. Additionally, Genet's movement builds momentum, setting Pouvoir on a violent collision course with the Union of Hope in the fight for France's future.

episodes.name: L'âme Perdue
episodes.overview: Daryl Dixon's arrival in France puts a young boy under the care of nuns in danger.

episodes.name: Alouette
episodes.overview: Daryl, Isabelle, Laurent, and Sylvie face trouble on the road. Isabelle remembers the day the hungry ones appeared. Laurent struggles to fit in.

episodes.name: Paris Sera Toujours Paris
episodes.overview: The group arrives in Paris, where Isabelle confronts her past while growing closer to Daryl. Codron seeks help from the leader of a growing nationalist movement called Pouvoir, putting the Union of Hope and Laurent under dangerous scrutiny.

episodes.name: La Dame de Fer
episodes.overview: Daryl and Isabelle must negotiate with Quinn, the proprietor of the underground Demimonde club - the last vestige of art and expression in Paris.

episodes.name: Deux Amours
episodes.overview: Daryl faces old demons, recalling the circumstances that landed him in France. Isabelle's sacrifice forces her to consider drastic measures. Genet commences a celebration for the people of Paris.

episodes.name: Coming Home
episodes.overview: Genet solidifies her base of power. Before Daryl can return to America, he has a job to do.

Additionally, Genet's movement builds momentum, setting Pouvoir on a violent collision course with the Union of Hope in the fight for France's future.
